title: WorkflowSchema
description: JSON Schema defining canonical structure for Portable Agent Protocol (PAP) workflows.

description.description: Description of the workflow goal and process.

version.description: Semantic version of the workflow definition.

step_id.description: Unique identifier for this step within the workflow.

skill_id.description: The skill called during this step.

params.description: Hardcoded or dynamically mapped parameters to pass to the skill.

next_step.description: The ID of the step to execute next (null for end of workflow).

on_failure.description: Strategy when step execution encounters an error.

steps.description: Ordered sequence of steps to run.
